MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant K & H California's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery is granted. Further responses shall be made by November 17, 2008. The court finds circumstances which would make the imposition of sanctions unjust. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
